assertionResults.fullName: compress.via.llmlingua given: [case1] single markdown brief when: [t0] run with --mode plan then: shows compression preview without emit
assertionResults.title: then: shows compression preview without emit

assertionResults.fullName: compress.via.llmlingua given: [case1] single markdown brief when: [t1] run with --mode apply then: creates .md.min file
assertionResults.title: then: creates .md.min file

assertionResults.fullName: compress.via.llmlingua given: [case1] single markdown brief when: [t1] run with --mode apply then: compressed file is smaller
assertionResults.title: then: compressed file is smaller

assertionResults.fullName: compress.via.llmlingua given: [case1] single markdown brief when: [t1] run with --mode apply then: source file unchanged
assertionResults.title: then: source file unchanged

assertionResults.fullName: compress.via.llmlingua given: [case1] single markdown brief when: [t1] run with --mode apply then: reports compression ratio
assertionResults.title: then: reports compression ratio

assertionResults.fullName: compress.via.llmlingua given: [case2] glob pattern when: [t0] matches multiple files then: compresses all matched files
assertionResults.title: then: compresses all matched files

assertionResults.fullName: compress.via.llmlingua given: [case2] glob pattern when: [t1] matches no files then: exits non-zero with error
assertionResults.title: then: exits non-zero with error

assertionResults.fullName: compress.via.llmlingua given: [case3] staleness check when: [t0] source older than .md.min then: skips with up-to-date message
assertionResults.title: then: skips with up-to-date message

assertionResults.fullName: compress.via.llmlingua given: [case3] staleness check when: [t1] --force flag then: recompresses regardless
assertionResults.title: then: recompresses regardless

assertionResults.fullName: compress.via.llmlingua given: [case4] --into flag when: [t0] --into with single file then: writes to specified path instead of .min
assertionResults.title: then: writes to specified path instead of .min

assertionResults.fullName: compress.via.llmlingua given: [case5] ratio control when: [t0] --ratio 2 then: targets 2x compression
assertionResults.title: then: targets 2x compression

assertionResults.title: then: shows progress status

assertionResults.title: then: shows both failed and progress status

assertionResults.title: then: enables automerge then watches CI
